tagline: A Growing Legacy of Quality Pool, Awning, and Holiday Decor Services Since 1991

hero.headline: 35 Years Keeping Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Since 1991, Chester County families have trusted Great Valley Pool Service for weekly maintenance, seasonal openings, equipment repair, and more. With 25 trucks on the road and over 400 recurring customers, we show up on time so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care, Shade Solutions &<br class="hidden md:block"> Holiday Magic Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly pool maintenance to retractable awnings and holiday lighting, Great Valley Pool Service handles it all so you can enjoy your home year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Reliable weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks from our team of expert technicians. Over 400 families count on us every week to keep their pool swim-ready.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: We open and close 1,500+ pools every season with thorough equipment inspections, chemical balancing, and proper winterization to protect your investment.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and custom covers from all major brands. Professional installation and same-visit repairs when possible.

cards.title: Retractable Awnings & Shade
cards.description: Custom retractable awnings, screens, and porch enclosures with hundreds of fabric options. Industry-leading warranties and professional installation.

cards.title: Holiday Lights & Decor
cards.description: Commercial-grade holiday lighting and greenery for homes and businesses. We handle design, installation, maintenance, takedown, and off-season storage.

cards.title: Pool Supplies & Retail Store
cards.description: Visit our fully stocked retail shop for chemicals, accessories, and expert advice. Open seven days a week with knowledgeable staff ready to help.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Request a Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote and schedule your first visit within days.

steps.title: Our Crew Takes It from Here
steps.description: One of our 25 fully equipped trucks arrives on schedule. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, repairs — our experienced technicians handle every detail.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. With 35 years of experience behind every visit, your satisfaction is always guaranteed.

about.label: Why Chester County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1991 — Three Generations of Pool Expertise
about.description: Co-owned by Tracy and Cecil Bond since 2014, Great Valley Pool Service has grown from a small local operation into a multi-division company with 25 service trucks, over 400 recurring maintenance customers, and three service divisions. We have earned a 4.9-star Google rating, PSN Top 50, AQUA 100, and multiple Best of Chester County awards because we treat every pool like our own.

features.title: 25 Trucks, Always On Time
features.description: Our fleet of 25 fully equipped service trucks means we are never late and always ready to handle any pool, awning, or lighting job.

features.title: Free Pool School Twice a Year
features.description: We host free educational sessions so pool owners can learn water chemistry, maintenance tips, and equipment care from industry experts.

features.title: Loyalty-First, Award-Winning Service
features.description: During supply shortages we prioritized existing customers first. That loyalty-first approach earned us multiple industry awards and lifelong customers.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your needs. Upgrade, adjust, or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have upheld this promise for over 35 years and 330+ five-star reviews prove it works.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get on the schedule?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent needs like green pool recovery, we offer priority same-week response. Call us at (610) 889-0711 and we will find a time that works.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in Delaware too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We serve Chester County and Delaware County in PA, plus New Castle County in DE, and surrounding communities within about 50 miles of Frazer, PA. Our 25 trucks cover a wide service area.

faqs.question: What makes Great Valley different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Three things: 35 years of experience, a fleet of 25 trucks so we are always on time, and three divisions under one roof — pool service, awnings, and holiday lighting. Plus we have won PSN Top 50 and AQUA 100 awards for service excellence.

faqs.question: Do you offer awning and holiday lighting services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our awning division installs retractable awnings, screens, and shade solutions. Our holiday division handles design, installation, takedown, and storage of commercial-grade lights and decor for both residential and commercial properties.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most customers provide gate or yard access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive updates so you always know what was done during each visit.

testimonials.name: Runner G.
testimonials.text: Goes above and beyond. I previously lived in this area and used this company... best in the area. They are there when you need them. Could not ask for a better pool service team.

testimonials.name: Krissy T.
testimonials.text: A great company! I found this company to be wonderful. They provided courteous service and a knowledgeable staff. We have been so impressed with their attention to detail.

testimonials.name: Shane M.
testimonials.text: Great people, great service. I have used these guys for a couple of years now and find them to be a joy to work with. Reliable, professional, and genuinely care about their customers.
